description: CompositionBlack scooped neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryGet moving in this black tee from nike. The scooped neck design and the short sleeves are complemented by the "Unstoppable Skills" lettering on the front that gives this tee a confident vibe. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a sporty look.
